title: Document init manifest and upgrade workflow
description: Update user-facing documentation for init-time manifest creation, upgrade behavior, ownership controls, dry-run usage, and the handling of bundled assets removed in newer takt releases.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain when `.takt/assets-manifest.json` is created and why rerun init should be replaced with `takt upgrade`.
Docs describe `takt upgrade`, `takt upgrade --dry-run`, and `takt asset {mark-owned,unmark-owned,list}` usage and expected outcomes.
Docs call out that substituted guardrail templates are treated as user-owned and that removed bundled assets are renamed to `.disabled`.
